prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a widely used approach for simulating stock prices. Historical daily adjusted close prices for PLD over the past 252 trading days (approximately one year, ending 2024-05-22) were used to estimate the model parameters. The mean daily log return (drift, mu_d) was calculated to be approximately 0.000306, and the standard deviation of daily log returns (volatility, sigma_d) was approximately 0.0124. These parameters were then applied to project the price over an 18-day period. The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal distribution of prices, while the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of this distribution, reflecting the inherent uncertainty due to volatility.
